functions.test_requirement: Cover broker invitations from the client side and freelancer recommendations from the assigned broker side, including duplicate, ownership, client-spec, and existing-association failures with executed Jest evidence.

preconditions: Broker "broker-1" has no existing application or invitation on request "req-invite-1"
returns: returns broker invitation with status = INVITED

exceptions: Error: Request already has a broker assigned
logs: Invite Broker Failed: Request already has a broker assigned

preconditions: Broker "broker-1" already has an existing invitation on request "req-invite-3"
logs: Invite Broker Failed: Broker already invited

preconditions: Broker "broker-1" already has a pending application on request "req-invite-4"
logs: Invite Broker Failed: Broker has already applied

preconditions: Request "req-1" is in freelancer recommendation phase "FREELANCER_SELECTION"
Assigned broker "broker-1" is acting on request "req-1"
Latest client spec for request "req-1" is "CLIENT_APPROVED"
No freelancer has been selected for request "req-1"
returns: returns freelancer recommendation with status = PENDING_CLIENT_APPROVAL

preconditions: Request "req-1" is in freelancer recommendation phase "FREELANCER_SELECTION"
Authenticated broker "broker-1" is not the assigned broker for request "req-1"
exceptions: ForbiddenException: Only the assigned broker or internal staff can recommend freelancers.
logs: Invite Freelancer Failed: Only the assigned broker or internal staff can recommend freelancers.

preconditions: Latest client spec for request "req-1" is not yet "CLIENT_APPROVED"
exceptions: BadRequestException: Freelancer recommendations are only available after the client approves the client spec.
logs: Invite Freelancer Failed: Freelancer recommendations are only available after the client approves the client spec.

preconditions: Request "req-1" is in freelancer recommendation phase "FREELANCER_SELECTION"
Latest client spec for request "req-1" is "CLIENT_APPROVED"
Freelancer "freelancer-1" is already associated with request "req-1" in status "INVITED"
exceptions: Error: Freelancer already associated with this request (Status: INVITED)
logs: Invite Freelancer Failed: Freelancer already associated with this request (Status: INVITED)
